exploration_notes: The optimization targets _aggregate_series_pure_python in pandas/core/groupby/ops.py. The bottleneck was that for every group, a full Series object was constructed via SeriesSplitter._chop (involving _mgr.get_slice, _constructor_from_mgr, __finalize__). The fix bypasses Series construction by working directly with numpy array slices: it extracts the underlying values via obj._values, sorts them once, generates group slices with lib.generate_slices, and passes numpy array views directly to the ag
